prompt: A cheerful and modern advertisement-style photo of a smiling young woman with natural flowing hair, wearing a stylish {argument name=\"outfit color\" default=\"mustard-yellow\"} suit paired with clean white sneakers. She is sitting cross-legged against a solid mustard-yellow background in a confident playful pose. She holds a single crispy potato chip in one hand and a large yellow bag of ‘{argument name=\"brand\" default=\"Lay’s Classic\"}’ chips in the other, presenting it toward the camera with a bright energetic smile. Several golden potato chips are floating dynamically in the air around her, creating movement and a lively commercial atmosphere. At the top, bold elegant white cursive typography reads ‘{argument name=\"name\" default=\"Fatima Batool\"}’ with small glowing star accents surrounding the text. On the left side, stylish white handwritten-style promotional text reads ‘Simple. Tasty. Perfect.’ with a small white arrow pointing toward her and the chip bag.
